# 获取视频号视频一级评论

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 获取视频号视频一级评论
      deprecated: false
      description: >-
        | 字段 | 说明 |

        | --- | --- |

        code = 0 | 调用成功

        101      |object_id 错误请检查

        102      |last_buffer 错误请检查

        103      |获取留言失败

        105      |请求类型不存在

        20001    |金额不足

        50000    |服务器内部错误




        | 字段 | 说明 |

        | --- | --- |

        ['comment_info']   |评论列表

        ['last_buffer']   |获取一级评论翻页参数 首页不填，第二页以后填入上一页返回的 last_buffer

        ['down_continue_flag']| 一级评论是否可以翻页 1 可以 0不可以

        ['comment_info'][i]['last_buffer']|获取二级评论需要传入的翻页参数，可能是空 如果作者回复过或者点赞过
        该值不为空

        ['comment_info'][i]['comment_id']|获取二级评论需要传入的 root_comment_id

        ['expand_comment_count']  | 二级评论的个数 （注意：本接口不返回二级评论，请调用二级评论接口）

        ['down_continue_flag'] | 是否有下一页（1：有下一页， 0： 无下一页）

        ['cost']   |花费

        ['remain_money'] | 余额
      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                object_id:
                  type: string
                  description: 视频唯一id 例如 ：14462543356698040491
                object_nonce_id:
                  type: string
                  description: 该参数不填也可以，建议填上
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了key （0.05/次）
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 如果设置了需要填写
                type:
                  type: string
                  description: 固定值 type=10
                last_buffer:
                  type: string
                  description: 翻页参数  首页不填，第二页以后填入上一页返回的  last_buffer
              x-apifox-orders:
                - object_id
                - object_nonce_id
                - type
                - last_buffer
                - key
                - verifycode
              required:
                - object_id
                - key
                - type
            example:
              object_id: 14462543356698040000
              object_nonce_id: ''
              type: 10
              last_buffer: ''
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                    description: 状态码
                  comment_info:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        username:
                          type: string
                          description: 评论者 id
                        nickname:
                          type: string
                          description: 评论者昵称
                        content:
                          type: string
                          description: 评论内容
                        comment_id:
                          type: string
                          description: 评论id
                        reply_comment_id:
                          type: string
                          description: 二级回复的id（一级为0）
                        head_url:
                          type: string
                          description: 评论者头像
                        level_two_comment:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              username:
                                type: string
                              nickname:
                                type: string
                              content:
                                type: string
                              comment_id:
                                type: string
                              reply_comment_id:
                                type: string
                              head_url:
                                type: string
                              level_two_comment:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                              createtime:
                                type: string
                              like_flag:
                                type: integer
                              like_count:
                                type: integer
                              display_flag:
                                type: integer
                              reply_content:
                                type: string
                              author_contact:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  username:
                                    type: string
                                  nickname:
                                    type: string
                                  head_url:
                                    type: string
                                  bind_info:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: string
                                  menu:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: string
                                  ext_info:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      sex:
                                        type: integer
                                    required:
                                      - sex
                                    x-apifox-orders:
                                      - sex
                                required:
                                  - username
                                  - nickname
                                  - head_url
                                  - bind_info
                                  - menu
                                x-apifox-orders:
                                  - username
                                  - nickname
                                  - head_url
                                  - bind_info
                                  - menu
                                  - ext_info
                              content_type:
                                type: integer
                              report_json:
                                type: string
                              ip_region_info:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  region_text:
                                    type: string
                                required:
                                  - region_text
                                x-apifox-orders:
                                  - region_text
                              search_keyword_info:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                              mentioned_user_info:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                            required:
                              - username

                              - content
                              - comment_id

                              - head_url
                              - level_two_comment
                              - createtime
                              - like_flag
                              - like_count
                              - display_flag
                              - reply_content
                              - author_contact
                              - content_type
                              - report_json
                              - ip_region_info

                              - mentioned_user_info
                            x-apifox-orders:

                          description: 二级评论（只显示作者的 别人回复的没有）
                        createtime:
                          type: string

                        like_flag:
                          type: integer

                        like_count:

                            username:
                              type: string

                            nickname:
                              type: string

                                - sex

                            - username

                            - bind_info
                            - menu
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - username

                          description: 评论者信息
```
